allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('STATUS:', d['status'], '| TOTAL:', d.get\('total','?'\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('status:', d['status']\); print\('players:', len\(d.get\('data',{}\).get\('players',[]\)\)\); [print\(p['playerName'], p['points']\) for p in \(d.get\('data',{}\).get\('players',[]\) or []\)[:5]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); p=d['data']; print\(p['fullName'], p['teamAbbreviation'], p['position'], p['country']\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); seasons=d['data']['seasons']; print\(f'{len\(seasons\)} temporadas'\); [print\(s['season'], s['points'], 'pts'\) for s in seasons[-3:]]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); dates=d['data']['dates']; print\(f'{len\(dates\)} datas'\); print\('Primeira:', dates[0]\); print\('Última:', dates[-1]\); today='2026-05-21'; near=[x for x in dates if x >= today][:5]; print\('Próximas:', near\)")
